name: Ciera Frazier Enterprise
description_short: Licensed credit consulting firm in Columbus, OH offering free consultations and affordable credit counseling, repair, and business coaching services.
description_long:
Frazier Consulting Services LLC is a licensed and bonded credit consulting company based in Columbus, Ohio, operating under the ownership of Ciera Frazier. The company has been in the credit consulting industry for over seven years and positions itself as a professional alternative to DIY credit building. They serve both individual consumers and small business owners throughout the Columbus area.

The company offers four primary service lines: credit repair (disputing negative items and removing claims), credit counseling (personalized credit building strategy), business credit establishment, and business coaching. They emphasize one-on-one consultations to diagnose credit issues and create customized plans. The business coaching service extends beyond credit to general entrepreneurship guidance for business owners.

Frazier Consulting Services differentiates itself through licensed and bonded credentials, free initial consultations, affordable pricing structure, and the owner's seven years of industry experience. Their marketing emphasizes quick and reliable results, and they provide multiple contact methods (phone, email) with after-hours availability. The website features five client testimonials highlighting score improvements (up to 40 points) and major life outcomes like home purchases at age 25.

A key consideration is that while the website claims to be licensed and bonded, the actual business model appears to be credit counseling/coaching rather than credit repair in the traditional sense. The company describes working with clients to 'create new lines of credit' and remove claims, but does not clearly explain their dispute methodology or regulatory compliance (CFCC certification, NFCC membership, etc.). Testimonials suggest legitimate results but lack specificity about timelines or service costs.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free consultations with no upfront cost to evaluate credit situation
Licensed and bonded company with owner having 7+ years of industry experience
One-on-one personalized consultations rather than automated/generic solutions
Multiple contact methods with after-hours availability (614-541-3232 and 866-856-9774)
Serves both individuals and businesses, offering credit counseling, repair, and business coaching
Client testimonials show documented credit score improvements (up to 40-point increases)
Affordable pricing model explicitly mentioned on website
cons: No mention of NFCC certification, CFCC compliance, or regulatory affiliations that legitimate credit counselors typically highlight
Website does not clearly explain dispute methodology, success rates, or typical timelines for credit repair results
No pricing transparency—claims affordability but provides no actual fee structure or service costs
Limited information about whether they handle credit counseling as financial education vs. credit repair as item removal
No disclosure of potential conflicts of interest if they earn commissions from credit products they recommend
best_for: Columbus, OH residents seeking personalized credit counseling and building strategy from a local professional
Small business owners needing help establishing business credit and basic entrepreneurial coaching
Consumers with credit scores below 700 looking for professional guidance on raising scores over time
Individuals who prefer one-on-one consultation over DIY credit repair tools or large national services
diagnosis: Frazier Consulting Services is best for Columbus-area residents seeking personalized, local credit counseling from a licensed professional rather than DIY tools or national firms. However, consumers should request clear documentation of their regulatory compliance (NFCC or CFCC certification), actual pricing, and dispute methodology before enrolling, as the website lacks transparency on these critical details typical of legitimate credit counseling agencies.
services: Credit repair and dispute services to remove negative claims from credit reports
Credit counseling and personalized credit building strategy development
One-on-one credit consultations and credit score analysis
Business credit establishment and building for new or growing ventures
Business coaching and general entrepreneurship guidance
Credit score improvement planning and monitoring
Assistance with establishing new lines of credit
Service for both individuals and businesses
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 875 N High St Ste 300, Columbus, OH 43201
